text: Managing a team effectively requires a combination of key skills. First, clear communication is essential to ensure everyone understands their tasks and goals. Delegation is also important—you should assign responsibilities based on each team member's strengths. Regular feedback helps people improve and feel valued. To keep motivation high, celebrate achievements and create a positive work environment. Finally, conflict resolution is crucial; when disagreements arise, address them calmly and listen to all sides. By focusing on these areas, you can build a strong, collaborative team that works efficiently together.
